productDisplayName: Black Coffee Men Check White Shirt
description: Composition White formal shirt with thin blue checks, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full length buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest, and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Impeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from black coffee has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight Fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18"
